name: Rehgar
description: A well-rounded Healer that pairs well with Melee allies.
title: Shaman of the Earthen Ring
info: Rehgar Earthfury has seen his share of combat, both as a gladiator, and a master of his own team. Now, having put that life aside, he serves as a simple shaman of the Earthen Ring, earning his redemption by healing the lands of Azeroth.

Rehgar.name: Chain Heal
Rehgar.description: Heal an ally with a wave of healing for 260 (+4% per level) Health. The wave then bounces 2 times to nearby allies within 7 range, restoring 260 (+4% per level) Health to them.

Rehgar.name: Lightning Shield
Rehgar.description: Imbue an ally with lightning dealing 64 (+4% per level) damage a second to nearby enemies. Each enemy hit restores 1 Mana to Rehgar. Lasts 5 seconds.

Rehgar.name: Earthbind Totem
Rehgar.description: Create a totem that Slows nearby enemies by 35%. The totem has 260 (+4% per level) Health and lasts for 6 seconds.

Rehgar.name: Bloodlust
Rehgar.description: Grant nearby allied Heroes 40% Attack Speed and 35% Movement Speed and causes them to heal for 30% of the Basic Attack damage to their primary target. Lasts for 6 seconds.

Rehgar.name: Ancestral Healing
Rehgar.description: After 1 second, heal an allied Hero for 1180 (+4% per level) Health.

Rehgar.name: Purge
Rehgar.description: When used on an allied Hero, make them Unstoppable for 0.5 seconds. When used on an enemy Hero, Slow them by 80%, decaying over 2 seconds.  Cannot be cast on yourself.

Rehgar.name: Ghost Wolf
Rehgar.description: Instead of using a mount, Rehgar transforms into a Ghost Wolf with 20% increased Movement Speed. Basic Attacks in Ghost Wolf form cause him to lunge at his target and deal 60% bonus damage. Dealing damage, using Abilities, and channeling cancels Ghost Wolf form.

1.name: Stormcaller
1.description: Increase the radius of Lightning Shield by 25%.  Quest: Each time Lightning Shield damages an enemy Hero, permanently increase Rehgar's Health by 2 and Mana by 1, stacking up to 200 times.

1.name: Colossal Totem
1.description: Reactivate Earthbind Totem to move an existing totem to a new location. This can be used once per cast.  Passive: Increase Earthbind Totem's area and duration by 50%, and Health by 25%.

1.name: Feral Heart
1.description: Ghost Wolf's Movement Speed bonus is increased to 40% for the first second, then falls to 30%. Entering or exiting Ghost Wolf form grants 15 Armor for 1 second.

4.name: Earthliving Enchant
4.description: When Chain Heal heals a Hero below 50% Health, they are healed an additional 160 (+4% per level) Health over 4 seconds.

4.name: Electric Charge
4.description: The bearer of Lightning Shield Heals for 20% of the damage it deals to enemy Heroes, doubled if the bearer is Rehgar.  While Lightning Shield is damaging an enemy, its bearer gains 10% increased Movement Speed.

4.name: Healing Totem
4.description: Activate to place a Totem that heals allied Heroes in an area for 2% of their maximum Health every second. This Totem has 125 (+4% per level) Health and lasts for 10 seconds.

7.name: Grounded Totem
7.description: Enemy Heroes in Earthbind Totem's area also have their Attack Speed Slowed by 15% and their Spell Power reduced by 15%.  Passive: Increase Earthbind Totem's cast range by 45%.

7.name: Purification
7.description: If Purge removes a Slow, Stun, Root, or Silence effect from an ally, heal them for 220 (+4% per level).  Using Purge on an enemy Hero deals up to 330 (+4% per level) damage to Shields and reduces healing received by 40% for 2 seconds.  Passive: Reduce Purge's cooldown by 15 seconds.

7.name: Blood and Thunder
7.description: Ghost Wolf attacks reduce Basic Ability cooldowns by 1.5 seconds and restore 4% of Rehgar's maximum Mana.

10.name: Ancestral Healing
10.description: After 1 second, heal an allied Hero for 1180 (+4% per level) Health.

10.name: Bloodlust
10.description: Grant nearby allied Heroes 40% Attack Speed and 35% Movement Speed and causes them to heal for 30% of the Basic Attack damage to their primary target. Lasts for 6 seconds.

13.name: Tidal Waves
13.description: Reduces Chain Heal's cooldown by 1 second for each Hero healed, and reduces its Mana cost from 60 to 40.

13.name: Earth Shield
13.description: Lightning Shield gives Heroes a Shield that absorbs damage equal to 14% of their maximum Health for 3 seconds.

13.name: Wellspring
13.description: Every 2 seconds, Earthbind Totem will cast an untalented Chain Heal at the nearest allied Hero with the lowest Health. This Chain Heal heals for 35% of its normal amount.

16.name: Rising Storm
16.description: Every time a Lightning Shield damages an enemy Hero, increase its damage by 10%. Stacks up to 15 times.  Passive: Increase the duration of Lightning Shield by 3 seconds.

16.name: Earthgrasp Totem
16.description: When Earthbind Totem is first cast, it deals 90 (+4% per level) damage and Slows nearby enemies by 90% for 1 second.

16.name: Hunger of the Wolf
16.description: Ghost Wolf attacks against Heroes deal an additional 6% of the target's maximum Health and heal Rehgar for 6% of his maximum Health.

20.name: Farseer's Blessing
20.description: After 1.5 seconds, Ancestral Healing is cast a second time on the same target. Allies near the target are healed for 590 (+4% per level).

20.name: Gladiator's War Shout
20.description: Increase the duration and range of Bloodlust by 100%.

20.name: Elemental Conduit
20.description: Activate to gain Lightning Shield and grant all nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to 10% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds.  For up to 5 seconds after activating, hitting an enemy Hero with this effects' Lightning Shield gives nearby allies a Shield equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds.

20.name: Pit Fighter
20.description: Gain 10% increased Attack Damage and 3 Spell Power. Each nearby ally Hero grants an additional stack of this effect, up to 5 stacks.  While at 2 or more stacks, Purge's cooldown refreshes 50% faster.

tooltipMarkup.RehgarAncestralHealing: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarAncestralHealingCreatePersistent,PeriodCount*Effect,RehgarAncestralHealingCreatePersistent,PeriodicPeriodArray[0]" precision="2" player="0"/></c> second, heal an allied Hero for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarAncestralHealingCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarAncestralHealingFarseersBlessing: After <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarAncestralHealingFarseersBlessingDelayBehavior,Duration"Precision="2"/></c> seconds, Ancestral Healing is cast a second time on the same target. Allies near the target are healed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarAncestralHealingFarseersBlessingCreateHealer,RechargeVitalRate"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarBloodAndThunder: Ghost Wolf attacks reduce Basic Ability cooldowns by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,RehgarGhostWolfBloodAndThunderModifyUnitCooldown,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse"precision="1"/></c> seconds and restore <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarGhostWolfBloodAndThunderTalentManaRestore,RechargeVitalFraction*100"/>%</c> of Rehgar's maximum Mana.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarBloodlust: Grant nearby allied Heroes <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RehgarBloodlustBasicAttackBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c> Attack Speed and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarBloodlustMovementSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c> Movement Speed and causes them to heal for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarBloodlustBasicAttackBuff,Modification.VitalDamageLeechArray[Life].KindArray[Basic]*100" precision="2" player="0"/>%</c> of the Basic Attack damage to their primary target. Lasts for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarBloodlustBasicAttackBuff,Duration" precision="2" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarBloodlustGladiatorsWarShout: Increase the duration and range of Bloodlust by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RehgarBloodlustBasicAttackBuff,Duration/Talent,RehgarGladiatorsWarShout,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value"Player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarChainHeal: Heal an ally with a wave of healing for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarChainHealPrimaryHeal,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health. The wave then bounces <c val="#TooltipNumbers">2</c> times to nearby allies within <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarChainHeal1SearchForNewTarget,AreaArray[0].Radius"/></c> range, restoring <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarChainHealSecondaryHeal,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Health to them.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarChainHealTidalWavesTalent: Reduces Chain Heal's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers">1</c> second for each Hero healed, and reduces its Mana cost from <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,RehgarChainHeal,Cost[0].Vital[Energy]" player="0"/></c> to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Abil,RehgarChainHeal,Cost[0].Vital[Energy]+Talent,RehgarMasteryTidalWaves,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value" player="0"/></c>.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarEarthbindTotem: Create a totem that Slows nearby enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,RehgarEarthbindTotemSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c>. The totem has <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,RehgarEarthbindTotem,LifeMax"/></c> Health and lasts for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarEarthbindTotemTimedLife,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarEarthbindTotemColossalTotem: Reactivate Earthbind Totem to move an existing totem to a new location. This can be used once per cast.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Earthbind Totem's area and duration by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="((Talent,RehgarEarthbindTotemColossalTotem,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value+Effect,RehgarEarthbindTotemSearch,AreaArray[0].Radius)/Effect,RehgarEarthbindTotemSearch,AreaArray[0].Radius-1)*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c>, and Health by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RehgarEarthbindTotemColossalTotemTalentHealthBuff,Modification.VitalMaxFractionArray[Life]"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarEarthbindTotemEarthgraspTotem: When Earthbind Totem is first cast, it deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarEarthbindTotemEarthgraspTotemTalentDamage,Amount"/></c> damage and Slows nearby enemies by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,RehgarEarthbindTotemEarthgraspTotemSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarEarthbindTotemEarthgraspTotemSlow,Duration" precision="1" player="0"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarEarthbindTotemGroundedTotem: Enemy Heroes in Earthbind Totem's area also have their Attack Speed Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,RehgarEarthbindTotemGroundedTotemAttackSpeedDebuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> and their Spell Power reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,RehgarEarthbindTotemGroundedTotemTalentSpellpowerDebuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction"/>%</c>.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase Earthbind Totem's cast range by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Talent,RehgarEarthbindTotemGroundedTotem,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[0].Value/Abil,RehgarEarthbindTotem,Range)"player="0"/>%</c>.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarEarthlivingEnchant: When Chain Heal heals a Hero below <c val="#TooltipNumbers">50%</c> Health, they are healed an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarChainHealEarthlivingEnchantHealer,RechargeVitalRate*Behavior,RehgarChainHealEarthlivingEnchantHeal,Duration"/></c> Health over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarChainHealEarthlivingEnchantHeal,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarElementalConduit: Activate to gain Lightning Shield and grant all nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RehgarElementalConduitTalentBaseShield,DamageResponse.ModifyLimitVitalMaxFractionArray[Life]"/>%</c> of their maximum Health for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarElementalConduitTalentShieldStack,Duration"/></c> seconds. <n/><n/>For up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarElementalConduitActiveBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds after activating, hitting an enemy Hero with this effects' Lightning Shield gives nearby allies a Shield equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RehgarElementalConduitTalentShieldStack,DamageResponse.ModifyLimitVitalMaxFractionArray[Life]"precision="2"/>%</c> of their maximum Health for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarElementalConduitTalentShieldStack,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarGhostWolfActivate: Instead of using a mount, Rehgar transforms into a Ghost Wolf with <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RehgarGhostWolfBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"player="0"/>%</c> increased Movement Speed. Basic Attacks in Ghost Wolf form cause him to lunge at his target and deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[0].Modifier*100" player="0" precision="2"/>%</c> bonus damage. Dealing damage, using Abilities, and channeling cancels Ghost Wolf form.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarGhostWolfFeralHeartTalent: Ghost Wolf's Movement Speed bonus is increased to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Effect,RehgarGhostWolfFeralHeartTalentModifyPlayer,EffectArray[0].Value)"player="0"/>%</c> for the first second, then falls to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Behavior,RehgarGhostWolfBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor+Talent,RehgarFeralHeart,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value)"player="0"/>%</c>. Entering or exiting Ghost Wolf form grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarGhostWolfFeralHeartTalentArmor,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> Armor for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarGhostWolfFeralHeartTalentArmor,Duration"/></c> second.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarHealingTotem: Activate to place a Totem that heals allied Heroes in an area for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,HealingWardHeal,RechargeVitalFraction*100"precision="1"/>%</c> of their maximum Health every second. This Totem has <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Unit,TalentHealingWard,LifeMax"/></c> Health and lasts for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,HealingWardTimedLife,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarHungeroftheWolf: Ghost Wolf attacks against Heroes deal an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarGhostWolfHungerOfTheWolfDamage,VitalFractionMax[Life]*100"/>%</c> of the target's maximum Health and heal Rehgar for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarGhostWolfHungerOfTheWolfCasterHealer,RechargeVitalFraction*100"/>%</c> of his maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarLightningShield: Imbue an ally with lightning dealing <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarLightningShieldDamage,Amount/Behavior,RehgarLightningShieldBuff,Period"/></c> damage a second to nearby enemies. Each enemy hit restores <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarLightningShieldManaRestore,RechargeVitalRate"/></c> Mana to Rehgar. Lasts <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarLightningShieldBuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarLightningShieldEarthShield: Lightning Shield gives Heroes a Shield that absorbs damage equal to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarLightningShieldEarthShieldBuff,DamageResponse.ModifyLimitVitalMaxFractionArray[Life]*100" player="0"/>%</c> of their maximum Health for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarLightningShieldEarthShieldBuff,Duration" player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarLightningShieldElectricCharge: The bearer of Lightning Shield Heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,RehgarLightningShieldDamage,LeechFraction[Life]"/>%</c> of the damage it deals to enemy Heroes, doubled if the bearer is Rehgar.<n/><n/>While Lightning Shield is damaging an enemy, its bearer gains <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,RehgarLightningShieldElectricChargeSpeedBuff,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> increased Movement Speed.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarLightningShieldRisingStorm: Every time a Lightning Shield damages an enemy Hero, increase its damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Accumulator,RehgarLightningShieldLightningStormDamageAccumulator,Scale*100"/>%</c>. Stacks up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarLightningShieldRisingStormTokenCounter,Max"/></c> times.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Increase the duration of Lightning Shield by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Talent,RehgarLightningShieldRisingStorm,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarLightningShieldStormcaller: Increase the radius of Lightning Shield by %. Quest: Each time Lightning Shield damages an enemy Hero, permanently increase Rehgar's Health by and Mana by , stacking up to times.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarPitFighter: Gain <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,RehgarPitFighterAttackAccumulator,Scale"/>%</c> increased Attack Damage and <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Accumulator,RehgarPitFighterSpellpowerAccumulator,Scale"/></c> Spell Power. Each nearby ally Hero grants an additional stack of this effect, up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="10*Accumulator,RehgarPitFighterAttackAccumulator,MaxAccumulation"/></c> stacks. <n/><n/>While at <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Validator,RehgarHasGTE2PitFighterTrackedUnits,Value"/></c> or more stacks, Purge's cooldown refreshes <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*(1/(Behavior,RehgarPitFighterCarry,Period/Effect,RehgarPitFighterModifyUnit,Cost[0].CooldownTimeUse))"/>%</c> faster.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarPurge: When used on an allied Hero, make them Unstoppable for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarPurgeBuff,Duration"precision="1"/></c> seconds. When used on an enemy Hero, Slow them by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,RehgarPurgeSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100"/>%</c>, decaying over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarPurgeSlow,Duration"precision="3"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/>Cannot be cast on yourself.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarPurification: If Purge removes a Slow, Stun, Root, or Silence effect from an ally, heal them for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarPurgePurificationTalentHeal,RechargeVitalRate"/></c>.<n/><n/>Using Purge on an enemy Hero deals up to <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,RehgarPurgePurificationTalentDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to Shields and reduces healing received by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,RehgarPurgePurificationTalentHealingReduction,Modification.HealTakenAdditiveMultiplier[Life]"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarPurgePurificationTalentHealingReduction,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Reduce Purge's cooldown by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,RehgarPurification,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[2].Value"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.RehgarWellspring: Every <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,RehgarEarthbindTotemWellspringTalentBuff,Period"precision="1"/></c> seconds, Earthbind Totem will cast an untalented Chain Heal at the nearest allied Hero with the lowest Health. This Chain Heal heals for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*(Effect,RehgarEarthbindTotemWellspringTalentChainHealPrimaryHeal,RechargeVitalRate/Effect,RehgarChainHealPrimaryHeal,RechargeVitalRate)"player="0"/>%</c> of its normal amount.
